## Problem

What workflow is difficult or impossible today?

## Proposed behavior

What should the editor do?

## Scope

Which area is affected?

- [ ] Canvas editing
- [ ] Text layout
- [ ] Tables
- [ ] Animation or media
- [ ] Export pipeline
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Constraints

Mention export fidelity, offline usage, accessibility, or compatibility requirements.
